name: OxyGenX Pod Set – ILLUMINATE POD
shortDescription: Skin tone evening OxyGenX pod set. 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Adds radiance and evens out dull skin tone.
description:
The ILLUMINATE POD set is a brightening and skin tone evening treatment package developed for the OxyGenX+ treatment device, which adds radiance to dull, tired skin.

The set contains 6 OxyGenX capsules (pods), 6 primer gels, and 6 serums – sufficient for 6 complete treatments.

During the treatment, the released CO₂ stimulates the skin's natural oxygen production (Bohr effect), while the special active ingredients even out skin tone and reduce hyperpigmentation.
metaTitle: OxyGenX ILLUMINATE POD set – brightening treatment package
metaDescription: ILLUMINATE POD set for OxyGenX+ device: 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Skin tone evening, radiance, pigmentation reduction. 12.990 Ft.

faq.question: How many treatments does an ILLUMINATE POD set last?
faq.answer: One set is sufficient for 6 complete treatments. It contains 6 capsules, 6 primer gels, and 6 serums.

faq.question: What skin type is the ILLUMINATE POD recommended for?
faq.answer: The ILLUMINATE POD is primarily recommended for pigmented, uneven-toned, and dull skin. It evens out skin tone, reduces hyperpigmentation, and adds radiance.

faq.question: Which device is the ILLUMINATE POD set compatible with?
faq.answer: The ILLUMINATE POD set is designed for the OxyGenX+ device's oxy-pod applicator. It is also compatible with the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 oxy-pod applicator.
